svg.title: Aral Sea ML architecture diagram
svg.desc: Diagram showing two parallel classification branches. The supervised branch shows 3x3x6 patch input through two Conv2D layers, flatten, dense, dropout to sigmoid output, with GP uncertainty wrapping the output. The unsupervised branch shows NDWI array through StandardScaler into K-Means, GMM, and DBSCAN classifiers, each producing a water/land label map. Both branches feed a water area estimate used in temporal drawdown analysis.
